title: Base & Bitwise Calculator
description: Convert across any radix (2–36) with BigInt support, two's-complement bit views (8/16/32/64-bit) and bitwise ops (AND/OR/XOR/NOT/shift). Fully local.

notice.title: Fully local · BigInt-backed
notice.body: All math uses BigInt — no precision loss beyond 64 bits; conversion, two's complement and bitwise ops run in your browser.

bitwise.heading: Bitwise
bitwise.hint: NOT and negative binaries are shown as two's complement at the current {{width}}-bit width.

error.parse: Cannot parse in this base (check digits vs base).
